html:
A Koalefant Trunk is a Meat Food item dropped by Koalefants. It can be used to craft a Breezy Vest.

Unlike most meats, Koalefant Trunks cannot be used in the Crock Pot or dried on the Drying Rack; however, they can be fed to a bird in a Birdcage to produce an Egg. Cooking increases the Health and Hunger benefits of the Trunk as well as more than doubling the spoil time.

Winter Koalefant Trunk

A Winter Koalefant Trunk is a Meat Food item dropped by Winter Koalefants. It does the exact same benefits as a Koalefant Trunk when consumed. It can be used to craft a Puffy Vest.

Koalefant Trunk Steak

A Koalefant Trunk Steak is made by cooking a Koalefant Trunk or a Winter Koalefant Trunk over a Campfire, Fire Pit or Star.

Although the Koalefant Trunk is a hearty food it may be wiser to make one first into a Breezy Vest for the Winter, due to the rarity of Koalefants. However, if it is near spoiling, it can be eaten to prevent it going to waste.

Usage

×8

×8

×2

Gallery

  • Original HD Koalefant Trunk icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Original HD Cooked Koalefant Trunk icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

"trunk_summer"
“A light breezy trunk.”
–Wilson, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“Well, part of him is still cuddly.”
–Willow, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“Is floppy nose.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“I would have preferred the ears.”
–Wendy, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“CABLE UNPLUGGED”
–WX-78, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“A utilitarian proboscis.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“It's pretty thin.”
–Woodie, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“Full of summer mucus.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“Fascinating! Even its trunk changes color!”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“The pöwerful trunk öf a fallen nöt-sö-hairy beast.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“We took his nose!”
–Webber, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“It's a meaty-looking trunk.”
–Walani, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“This meat has a gamey odor.”
–Warly, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“There be jewels and riches in this trunk?”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“WHAT 'TIS IN THIS NOSE!”
–Wilba, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“Bruamp nose”
–Wormwood, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“Swell. I'll add it to my collection of nose related treasures.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“I'll eat it. Don't think I won't.”
–Winona, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“I'll pass, I say!”
–Wortox, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“Got its nose!”
–Wurt, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“The fur's a little patchy.”
–Walter, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
“Thoroughly cleaned, I hope.”
–Wanda, when examining a Koelefant Trunk.
A Koalefant Trunk is a Meat Food item dropped by Koalefants. It can be used to craft a Breezy Vest.
Unlike most meats, Koalefant Trunks cannot be used in the Crock Pot or dried on the Drying Rack; however, they can be fed to a bird in a Birdcage to produce an Egg. Cooking increases the Health and Hunger benefits of the Trunk as well as more than doubling the spoil time.

"trunk_winter"
“A thick, hairy trunk.”
–Wilson, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“It's so soft and squishy!”
–Willow, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“Is floppy hairy nose.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“Separated from its only friend.”
–Wendy, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“CABLE IS MORE DISGUSTING AND HAIRY THAN NORMAL”
–WX-78, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“A specimen of leather and fur.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“It's thick and hairy.”
–Woodie, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“The trunk thickens in the winter to hold more mucus.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“It has an extra layer of insulation for the winter time.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“The pöwerful trunk öf a fallen hairy beast.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“He blue his nose.”
–Webber, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“It's a cold, meaty-looking trunk.”
–Walani, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“Not the finest cut of meat.”
–Warly, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“There be jewels and riches in this trunk?”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“IT SMELL AS SWEET”
–Wilba, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“Bruamp nose”
–Wormwood, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“Am I supposed to be proud of this?”
–Wheeler, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“I'll eat it. Don't think I won't.”
–Winona, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“No, no, no, not my taste at all.”
–Wortox, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“Fuzzy.”
–Wurt, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“It's full of nose hair.”
–Walter, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
“In the interest of time, I didn't bother removing the fur.”
–Wanda, when examining a Winter Koelefant Trunk.
A Winter Koalefant Trunk is a Meat Food item dropped by Winter Koalefants. It does the exact same benefits as a Koalefant Trunk when consumed. It can be used to craft a Puffy Vest.
Koalefant Trunk Steak[edit | edit source]
Koalefant Trunk
Food Info
75
40
0
Meat
Object Info
15 Days
20
Miscellaneous
"trunk_cooked"
“Somehow even more nasal than before.”
–Wilson, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“I'm still not sure I want to eat this.”
–Willow, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Is cooked nose.”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“It looks even worse now.”
–Wendy, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“MEAT RENDERED INACTIVE. EXCELLENT.”
–WX-78, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Unpalatable, but high in protein.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“I think it boiled off all of the nose cheese.”
–Woodie, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“At least the mucus burned off.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“A parboiled proboscis.”
–Wagstaff, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“A juicy reward after a hard battle.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Looks filling!”
–Webber, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Seems edible, as far as noses go.”
–Walani, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Could use... Hm... I'm stumped...”
–Warly, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Bin eatin' nastier noses than this.”
–Woodlegs, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“'TIS FOOD O' THE NOSE!”
–Wilba, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“For belly?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“I hope it tastes like chicken. And not nose.”
–Wheeler, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Singed the nosehairs right off.”
–Winona, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Goodness, no thank you.”
–Wortox, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Blegh!”
–Wurt, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“Thankfully booger-free. I think...”
–Walter, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
“You get used to the flavor after a while.”
–Wanda, when examining a Koelefant Trunk Steak.
A Koalefant Trunk Steak is made by cooking a Koalefant Trunk or a Winter Koalefant Trunk over a Campfire, Fire Pit or Star.
Although the Koalefant Trunk is a hearty food it may be wiser to make one first into a Breezy Vest for the Winter, due to the rarity of Koalefants. However, if it is near spoiling, it can be eaten to prevent it going to waste.

A '''Koalefant Trunk''' is a [[Meats|Meat]] [[Food]] item dropped by [[Koalefant]]s. It can be used to craft a [[Breezy Vest]].

Unlike most meats, Koalefant Trunks cannot be used in the [[Crock Pot]] or dried on the [[Drying Rack]]; however, they can be fed to a bird in a [[Birdcage]] to produce an [[Egg]]. Cooking increases the Health and Hunger benefits of the Trunk as well as more than doubling the spoil time.

A '''Koalefant Trunk Steak''' is made by cooking a Koalefant Trunk or a [[Winter Koalefant Trunk]] over a [[Campfire]], [[Fire Pit]] or [[Star Caller's Staff|Star]].

Although the Koalefant Trunk is a hearty food it may be wiser to make one first into a Breezy Vest for the Winter, due to the rarity of Koalefants. However, if it is near spoiling, it can be eaten to prevent it going to waste.
